name: wp-fix-workplan-inference-stalling
title: Fix workplan inference task stalling and state sync (ADR-2604180001)
description: Critical: Workplan processes hang silently during inference. Implement task-level timeouts, heartbeats, state sync, and orphan cleanup to enable autonomous workplan execution.

phases.title: Root cause diagnostics
phases.description: Determine why inference tasks stall: Ollama hang, I/O block, deadlock, or other

tasks.title: Instrument task execution with detailed logging
tasks.description:
Add logging at every checkpoint:
- Task state change (queued → running → done/error)
- Inference call start/end
- Ollama response received
- Compile gate result
File: hex-cli/src/commands/plan/executor.rs

tasks.title: Run instrumented workplan on Bazzite and capture stall logs
tasks.description:
Execute: hex plan execute wp-bazzite-e2e-arch-validation.json 2>&1 | tee /tmp/debug-stall.log
Let it run until stall (15min), capture full log.
Analyze: where does output stop? (inference call, waiting for nexus, compile gate, etc.)

tasks.title: Check Ollama status during stall
tasks.description:
While workplan is stalled:
1. ssh bazzite 'ollama ps' — is model running?
2. ssh bazzite 'ollama list' — models still available?
3. Check Bazzite system resources (free, top) — OOM? Disk full?
4. Check hex-nexus logs: any errors?

phases.title: Implement task-level timeout guards
phases.description: Add timeout enforcement per inference tier (prevent infinite hangs)

tasks.title: Add TimeoutGuard trait to task execution
tasks.description:
Implement TimeoutGuard in hex-cli/src/commands/plan/executor.rs:
- T1 tasks: 30s timeout
- T2 tasks: 120s timeout
- T2.5 tasks: 300s timeout
- T3 tasks: 600s timeout
On timeout: emit error, cleanup process, update nexus state

tasks.title: Test timeout guard on Bazzite with artificial delay
tasks.description:
Modify qwen2.5-coder to artificially delay response (sleep 200s).
Run workplan, verify:
- Task times out at 120s
- Process killed cleanly
- Nexus state updated to 'failed'
- Error message surfaces to user

phases.title: Implement heartbeat mechanism
phases.description: Emit progress every 30s so observers can detect stalls

tasks.title: Add TaskHeartbeat emission to executor
tasks.description:
Every 30s during task execution, emit heartbeat with:
- task_id
- phase
- current_step (e.g., 'generating code', 'compiling', 'testing')
- elapsed_ms
- tokens_used (if inference)
File: hex-cli/src/commands/plan/executor.rs

tasks.title: Wire heartbeat to nexus state updates
tasks.description:
On each heartbeat, POST /api/hexflo/tasks/{id}/heartbeat with progress data.
Nexus stores last_heartbeat timestamp.
Use for stale detection: if (now - last_heartbeat) > timeout → mark task dead

tasks.title: Verify heartbeat on Bazzite
tasks.description:
Run workplan and monitor:
hex swarm status (should show task heartbeats every 30s)
Or: curl http://localhost:5555/api/hexflo/tasks | jq '.[] | {id, last_heartbeat}'

phases.title: Implement orphan cleanup
phases.description: Background reaper kills processes that are stale (no heartbeat, state not updating)

tasks.title: Create OrphanReaper in hex-nexus
tasks.description:
Background task in hex-nexus:
1. Every 60s, scan all active tasks
2. For each task: if (now - last_heartbeat) > timeout
   - Emit warning log
   - Send SIGTERM to process
   - Wait 10s
   - If still running, send SIGKILL
   - Update task state to 'failed' (timeout)
3. Report reaper activity in nexus logs
File: hex-nexus/src/coordination/mod.rs

tasks.title: Test orphan cleanup on Bazzite
tasks.description:
Manually create a stalled task process (infinite sleep).
Verify reaper detects it after timeout and kills it.
Check: process gone, task state updated, log entry present.

phases.title: Error reporting and surface causes
phases.description: Make failure reasons visible to user (not silent hangs)

tasks.title: Add TaskFailureReason enum
tasks.description:
Implement in hex-core/src/ports/:
enum TaskFailureReason {
  InferenceTimeout,
  CompileGateTimeout,
  InferenceError(String),
  OOM,
  NetworkError(String),
  UnknownError(String),
}

Update task state to include failure_reason.
File: hex-core/src/ports/task.rs

tasks.title: Capture and report failure reasons
tasks.description:
When task fails, populate failure_reason:
- If timeout: InferenceTimeout
- If compile failed: log the error, surface in CompileGateError
- If Ollama error: InferenceError(stderr)
File: hex-cli/src/commands/plan/executor.rs

tasks.title: Display failure reason to user
tasks.description:
When task completes with error, show:
Task P1-1 FAILED: InferenceTimeout (120s)
  Model: qwen2.5-coder:32b
  Tokens consumed: 755
  Action: Escalating to T2.5...

File: hex-cli/src/commands/plan/mod.rs (output formatting)

phases.title: End-to-end validation on Bazzite
phases.description: Retry e2e workplan with fixes in place

tasks.title: Rebuild hex-cli with all fixes
tasks.description:
ssh bazzite 'cd ~/hex-intf && cargo build -p hex-cli --release --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu'
Verify binary size/compile time (should be minimal changes)

tasks.title: Run e2e validation with monitoring
tasks.description:
Execute: hex plan execute wp-bazzite-e2e-arch-validation.json -v
Monitor in parallel:
- hex swarm status (every 30s)
- curl http://localhost:5555/api/hexflo/tasks (check heartbeats)
- tail /tmp/e2e.log (check task progress)
Expect: each task to emit heartbeat, show progress, either complete or fail with reason

tasks.title: Verify all 6 phases execute or fail gracefully
tasks.description:
Workplan should:
- P1: Complete or timeout with visible reason
- P2-P6: If P1 fails, attempt P2 anyway (or skip gracefully)
- Final report: which phases completed, which failed, why
Success: at least 50% of tasks complete (vs. 0% hanging)
